reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting appropriate permissions.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with multiple agents in sidebar.
Found and clicked "QA-20260417-013824-tvby" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened, status showing "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle", meeting requirement.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into message input — Message entered successfully in text field.
Clicked Send button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session created.
Waited for response (3 seconds) — Agent status changed to "awaiting input", Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access.
Reviewed Account Access Request card — Card displayed with GitHub account already connected, "Allow Access (1)" button available.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — Permission granted, agent resumed processing with status "working".
Waited for agent processing (10 seconds) — API Request Review dialog appeared asking to allow GitHub GET /user request.
Clicked "Allow" button on API request — Permission dialog expanded with scope options.
Clicked "Allow Once" button — One-time permission granted, agent resumed processing.
Waited for agent completion (10 seconds) — Agent completed with status "idle" and response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with GitHub username response.
